name: Mattius Wotrus
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears an almost complete set of iron armor, missing only a shield - the standard protective equipment of a Fighters Guild member on a routine mission.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: dutiful, brave, doomed
Role: Mattius Wotrus was a herder who joined the Fighters Guild, seeking a new life as a professional fighter. He was assigned to what seemed like a routine contract to clear trolls from Forsaken Mine south of Leyawiin, working alongside Viranus Donton and other guild members.
The Mission to Forsaken Mine: Mattius was part of a group sent to deal with what was reported as a troll problem in Forsaken Mine. It should have been a straightforward contract - the kind of work the Fighters Guild handles regularly. Instead, the mission became a massacre. The fighters encountered something far more dangerous than trolls within the mine, and Mattius fell in the northern dead-end of the first zone, dying alongside his fellow guild member Cargas Laftrius.
Personality - The Fallen Fighter: Mattius left his life as a herder to join the Fighters Guild, presumably seeking adventure, coin, or simply a different path than tending livestock. He followed his orders and descended into Forsaken Mine with his companions, armed and armored as a proper guild member. Whatever they encountered in those dark passages overwhelmed them, and Mattius met his end in the depths, far from the pastoral life he once knew.
author: Bethesda
